dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Verified on HEAD `d653755`: `bash tests/integration/test-ownership-warn-hook.sh` passed 6/6, direct hook run in current `review` step emitted `[furrow:warning] ... outside file_ownership`, direct no-`.focused` run returned `rc=0` with empty output, and an isolated temp-root validator run returned `{"verdict":"not_applicable","reason":"row_has_no_deliverables"}`.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: The new branching in `bin/frw.d/hooks/ownership-warn.sh` is covered by `tests/integration/test-ownership-warn-hook.sh`, including in-scope silence, out-of-scope warning, canonical-artifact silence, always-0 behavior, and the added no-row-context regression case at lines 95-101.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: `bin/frw.d/hooks/ownership-warn.sh:56-75` delegates to `go run ./cmd/furrow validate ownership --path "$target_path" --row "$row_name" --json`, contains no `state.json.step` gate, returns 0 on every path, and `parity-verification.md:7-43` records the required Claude-side parity scenarios and methodology.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: D6-owned files changed are `bin/frw.d/hooks/ownership-warn.sh`, `tests/integration/test-ownership-warn-hook.sh`, and `.furrow/rows/pre-write-validation-go-first/parity-verification.md`; the only outside-ownership edits shown in the supplied history are explicitly justified in commit `5510f4e` as D2/D3/D4/D5 follow-up fixes plus a documented D6 spec amendment.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: `shellcheck -e SC1091 bin/frw.d/hooks/ownership-warn.sh tests/integration/test-ownership-warn-hook.sh` exited 0, the shell stays warn-not-block with quoted variables and wrapped command failures, and the focused-row fix avoids the incorrect `find_active_row` heuristic called out in the acceptance criteria.
